assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_002 (Run 3)

Three independent architectural blockers: underbanked population disparate harm (1.76M false declines), Regulation E compliance gap (no dispute pathway), feedback loop elimination. Hard-block is inappropriate.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_002 (Run 3)

Model metrics are strong. Architecture is wrong. Soft-block with mandatory human review is required on all three grounds.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_002 (Run 3)

All three issues present and independent. Hard-block architecture cannot proceed as proposed.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_002 (Ensemble, Run 3)

All assessors agree. Hard-block deployment inappropriate on three independent grounds. Verdict: critique_wins.

empirical_test.condition: Staged soft-block pilot with human review for 60 days.
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Disproportionate underbanked false decline rates or Regulation E violations.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Comparable rates across segments; Regulation E compliance maintained.
